Annual Student Development Seminar 2026

This evaluation report serves as a guide for the institution to acknowledge the impact of the said event on the welfare and enjoyment of the students at La Verdad Christian College ŌĆō Apalit, Pampanga.

Quantitative Ratings

2. Comments and Suggestions

500 responses

Positive: 189 (38%)
Neutral: 165 (33%)
Negative: 146 (29%)

Qualitative Comments

Report Summary
Positive
Neutral
Negative

37.8% of the responses resulted to positive citing good overall experience such as the venue, speakers, and overall event experience.

33% of the responses resulted into neutral, providing balanced feedback without strong positive or negative sentiments.

29.2% of the responses resulted into negative regarding various aspects, suggesting areas that need improvement.

Note: Breakdown of qualitative comments will be on the next page

Event Insights and Recommendations

Ōśģ Needs Significant Improvement: With only 38% positive feedback from 500 responses, substantial changes are needed for future events.

ŌĆó Neutral Feedback (33%): A significant portion of responses were neutral, suggesting the event met basic expectations but didn't exceed them. Focus on creating more memorable and impactful experiences.

ŌĆó Improvement Opportunity: 29% negative feedback indicates specific areas need attention. Gather follow-up feedback to understand root causes and implement targeted improvements.

Disclaimer: This is a system-generated recommendation, decision is still up to the management for implementation

Thanks be to God!
